description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that defines variables GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_DOCKER, GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_ALPINE and GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_PYTHON, two stages (build and deploy), and workflow rules that run on merge requests, tags, the master branch and the arm64 branch. In the build stage add an image_devel job that uses the ${GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_DOCKER}-cli Docker image with a ${GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_DOCKER} service, runs "apk --update add coreutils bash git" and "git config --global --add safe.directory \"${CI_PROJECT_DIR}\"", then executes an if‑grep on stage1/00-boot-files/files/config.txt to set IMG_NAME suffix (‑arm64 or ‑armhf), writes a multi‑line config file with many variables via echo, and finally runs "REGISTER_BINFMT_MISC=0 ./build-docker.sh"; it caches artifacts deploy/*.info and deploy/image*.img.xz and runs only when $CI_COMMIT_TAG is null. Also add an image_release job that extends the same template, sets IMG_NAME to "raspios-SatNOGS", and runs only when a tag is present. Add an imager_devel job that uses the ${GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_ALPINE} image, sources "contrib/imager_functions.sh", runs an if‑grep on the same config.txt to set satnogs_image_word_size (64 or 32) and IMAGER_DEVICES, defines IMAGER_NAME, IMAGER_URL, IMAGER_RELEASE_DATE, IMAGER_EXTRACT_SIZE, IMAGER_EXTRACT_SHA256, IMAGER_IMAGE_DOWNLOAD_SIZE, IMAGER_IMAGE_DOWNLOAD_SHA256, then calls "generate_imager_sublist \"rpi-imager.${SATNOGS_IMAGE_FLAVOUR}${satnogs_image_word_size}.json\"", produces artifacts rpi-imager.devel32.json and rpi-imager.devel64.json, needs the image_devel job, and runs only when no tag is present. Add an imager_release job that mirrors imager_devel but sets SATNOGS_IMAGE_FLAVOUR to stable, depends on image_release, and runs only on tag commits. Finally, add a pages job in the deploy stage that uses the ${GITLAB_CI_IMAGE_PYTHON} image, installs curl, jq and jinja2 via "apk --update add curl jq" and "pip install jinja2", sources "contrib/imager_functions.sh", merges imager sublists with "merge_imager_sublists \"${CI_PAGES_URL}\" ${IMAGER_JSON_FILES} > public/rpi-imager.json", copies each generated JSON file into public/, generates a combined satnogs.json with "generate_imager_list \"$IMAGER_RPI_ORG_REPO\" public/rpi-imager.json > public/satnogs.json", runs "./contrib/create_pages.py", publishes the public/ directory as a Pages artifact, and runs on the master branch, the arm64 branch, or any tag.
